title: Jonas Dagmire's Skeletal Parrot
description: The remains of an ornery creature lay scattered across the lost island.

requirements.label: Reconstruct Jonas Dagmire's Skeletal Parrot in a Ghostly Bonesetter's Taxidermy Kit
Obtain a Ghostly Bonesetter's Taxidermy Kit from an undead peddler
Obtain the Skeletal Parrot's Innominate Bones
Reconstruct the Skeletal Parrot's Head in a Kromtus' Tiny Cranial Taxidermy Kit
Prove yourself to be a friend of The Kromtus
Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Cervical Vertebrae
Reconstruct the Skeletal Parrot's Torso in a Bloodfeather's Tiny Torso Taxidermy Kit
Prove yourself to be a friend of the Bloodfeather Aviaks
Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Lumbar Vertebrae
Reconstruct the Skeletal Parrot's Left Leg in a Thaell Ew's Tiny Limb Taxidermy Kit
Prove yourself to be a friend of The Thaell Ew
Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Left Patella
Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Left Tarsometatarsus
Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Left Digits
Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Left Tibiotarsus
Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Left Femur
Reconstruct the Skeletal Parrot's Right Leg in a Thaell Ew's Tiny Limb Taxidermy Kit
Prove yourself to be a friend of The Thaell Ew
Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Right Patella
Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Right Tarsometatarsus
Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Right Digits
Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Right Tibiotarsus
Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Right Femur
Reconstruct the Skeletal Parrot's Left Wing in a Thaell Ew's Tiny Limb Taxidermy Kit
Prove yourself to be a friend of The Thaell Ew
Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Left Humerus
Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Left Ulna
Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Left Radius
Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Left Carpometacarpus
Reconstruct the Skeletal Parrot's Right Wing in a Thaell Ew's Tiny Limb Taxidermy Kit

Obtain the Tiny Parrot's Right Humerus

title: Actualized Accounts (Arx Mentis)
description: It is no surprise that the citadel is so meticulous in its archival of every file and report its personnel write.

title: Apprentice's Accoutrements (Arx Mentis)
description: The tools and subjects of technicians and researchers from the laboratories of the citadel.

title: Armatalium Odalia (Combine Dredge)
description: Weapons crafted from ancient Combine materials now used by Lanys' followers.

title: Articles of Ambition (Tempest Temple)
description: The fervor to which the kedge of Thalassius took to the worship of Karana was both unprecedented and unexpected.

title: Articles of Animation (Arx Mentis)
description: Not every attempt at invoking life in tomes, brooms and flesh is successful.

title: Arx Anthology
description: The militarized citadel that sits above the city of Arx Mentis casts a dark shadow over the sea.

title: Ascendant's Afterthoughts (Arx Mentis)
description: Once a citizen 'ascends' from the city to the citadel they quickly lose touch with their former occupation.

title: Beachcomber's Booty (Brother Island)
description: The beach is a treasure trove of baubles.

title: Cavern Collectibles
description: The beauty of the caverns hides its deadly secrets.

title: Comfort in the Deep (Degmar, the Lost Castle)
description: Items of comfort to the Dwarves stuck in Degmar, the Lost Castle.

title: Cruelty T`Vyl (Combine Dredge)
description: Relics of those who serve Lanys T`Vyl in her search for Firiona.

title: Dearly Beloved (Caverns of Endless Song)
description: An aged assortment of trinkets reminiscent of wedding gifts.

title: Dredging Drudgery (Combine Dredge)
description: Though several societies have embraced the art of geomancy, few have done so with such blatant disregard for the land that they shape.

title: Dropped Detritus (Brother Island)
description: Sometimes the seemingly ordinary is worth collecting.

title: Dwarven Depths
description: The sad history of the Lost Castle Degmar leaves behind its traces.

title: Empty Nest (Thuliasaur Island)
description: The Stormscape were not the only Aviaks to migrate to these tropical islands.

title: Far, Wide and Deep
description: Lanys' relentless search for Firiona's whereabouts has driven her to not only search far and wide but now deep into the ocean.

title: Island Fragments
description: Islands are places to escape and to find interesting baubles.

title: Island Sands (Brother Island)
description: Possibly valuable sand found in and on animals of Brother Island.

title: Itching Insects (Brother Island)
description: An entomologist's dream. An arachnophobe's nightmare.

title: Katta Castrum Mementos (Katta Castrum: Deluge)
description: The people of Katta Castrum have left behind many personal treasures.

title: Keep Keepsakes (Degmar, the Lost Castle)
description: Items of interest from Degmar, the Lost Castle.

title: Keepsakes of the Murdered (Degmar, the Lost Castle)
description: Small personal items of those no longer with us.

title: Our Fading History (Thuliasaur Island)
description: The history of the Kromtus is a time honored oral tradition, though the aging elders often find themselves at a loss when recalling the finer details of their past.

title: Preserver's Prizes (Tempest Temple)
description: Wardens and warders have traveled from far and wide to investigate the work of the kedge arcanists.

title: Remnants of the Enraptured (Caverns of Endless Song)
description: Heirlooms and treasures of those who could not evade the siren's song.

title: Riding the Storm Out
description: A small selection of the extraordinary treasures found on this unnaturally formed island.

title: Ritualistic Remains (Tempest Temple)
description: The unbridled power that gave rise to the temple has left some rather impressive geological treasures scattered throughout the area.

title: Seabed Treasures (Katta Castrum: Deluge)
description: Rare and unique oddities from the ocean floor have poured in or been collected by residents.

title: Secrets Beneath the Ocean
description: Discover various treasures beneath the waves in the doomed city of Katta Castrum.

title: See the Darkened Sea
description: Complete all of the following achievements:

title: Shissar Armory (Katta Castrum: Deluge)
description: The Shissar invaders have left behind various weapons and equipment either willingly or not.

title: Subaqueous Seashells (Caverns of Endless Song)
description: A beautiful array of sea life has made their home in these caverns.

title: Subtle Extinction (Tempest Temple)
description: The traumatic change to the environment that brought life to the storm that surrounds the temple has wreaked havoc on the wildlife.

title: The Deep Darkened Sea
description: Complete all of the following achievements:

title: The Endless Song (Caverns of Endless Song)
description: A piece of poetry set to music that has been torn to shreds.

requirements.label: Left Half of The Endless Song Page VI
Right Half of The Endless Song Page VI
Last Page of The Endless Song

title: The Faceless' Forgotten (Thuliasaur Island)
description: The Thaell Ew rose from the humble beginnings to overtake this land and subjugate the fearsome dinosaurs, but it appears they are now losing ground to the savage beasts.

title: The Last Boat (Thuliasaur Island)
description: The island once held a combine outpost and observatory though no ship that has sailed here in the last hundred years has returned.

requirements.label: Jonas Dagmire's Little Toe Distal Phalanx

title: The Lost of This Land
description: On the edge of The Buried Sea sits an island left untouched by outsiders for the last hundred years.

title: Tools of the Assassins (Degmar, the Lost Castle)
description: Lost tools used in the series of horrible murders in Degmar, the Lost Castle.

title: Twenty Leagues (Combine Dredge)
description: Recently excavated artifacts of ancient Combine operations that the followers of Lanys aim to repurpose.

title: Waterlogged Tomes (Katta Castrum: Deluge)
description: Various tomes and writings are in danger of being buried beneath the waves.
